subject: [PATCH v4 0/4] btrfs: improve stalls under sudden writeback

2026-04-10.patch_summary: This patch series addresses stalls caused by sudden writeback on systems with large memory and disk sizes. The patches improve reservations for delayed refs in delalloc, reduce the size of work units in shrink_delalloc(), and make some basic smoothing changes to flush_space(). This is a targeted approach to mitigate issues related to metadata space system tailspins and user stalls waiting for ordered extents and delayed refs.

reviews.author: David Sterba
reviews.summary: Reviewer David Sterba pointed out a minor stylistic inconsistency in the patch, suggesting that key-value pairs in an ASSERT should not be separated by commas.
reviews.raw_body:
Small note, please don't put "," between the key=values, it's just
stylistic but to keep it consistent with the rest of the ASSERTs.
Thanks.
